creator: yinjieh@Crazyman.Dorm13.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
Update java/jdk-tutorial port.
	The original port is out of date and need to be updated.
	I mailed to the maintainer of that port and asked him for updating
	that port, but not receive his reply yet.
	So I update it by myself.

Fix: 

Patch file is at:
	http://www.csie.nctu.edu.tw/~yinjieh/jdk-tutorial.diff.gz
	Please update that port, thanks.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd ${PORTSDIR}/java/jdk-tutorial
	make
